title: viola palmata var. sororia
intro: Viola palmata var. sororia, also known as the pale violet, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola palmata var. sororia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
